commands.review_summary:
The PR makes loopback binding strict, suppresses gateway-owned same-PID port conflict hints in status output, and adds focused tests for gateway bind resolution, status gathering, and port formatting.

PR surface: Source +43, Tests +66. Total +109 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection gives a clear path on current main: loopback bind can fall back to 0.0.0.0 and command-only node listeners can produce unknown/multiple-listener hints, but I did not run a live sandboxed gateway status reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human handling remains because the contributor proof is test-only and maintainers need to accept the strict loopback compatibility tradeoff before merge.

target.title: fix: improve gateway sandbox diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- Improve gateway status diagnostics for sandbox false negatives such as loopback `EPERM` and HTTP `000`.
- Preserve host-side gateway status as the authoritative readback when sandbox-local probes cannot reach the local service.
- Add targeted coverage for the gateway status and port-formatting paths.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/status.gather.test.ts src/gateway/net.test.ts src/infra/ports-format.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Gateway status diagnostics now distinguish sandbox probe false negatives from real gateway failures so operators can trust host-side status proof.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at PR head `548d0d00de6e5f0501224c42ded14710de0fe020`; commands ran against the actual CLI, gateway, and port-formatting code.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/status.gather.test.ts src/gateway/net.test.ts src/infra/ports-format.test.ts`; `git diff --check`.

Evidence after fix: Terminal capture from the local OpenClaw checkout:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/status.gather.test.ts src/gateway/net.test.ts src/infra/ports-format.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts
unit-fast: 18 tests passed
gateway: 125 tests passed
cli: 25 tests passed
[test] passed 3 Vitest shards in 4.83s

$ git diff --check
exit status: 0
```

Observed result after fix: The status gather path reports the sandbox-blocked probe condition without reclassifying host-side status as a gateway outage, and the touched formatting helpers continue to pass their gateway/CLI test shards.

What was not tested: A live sandboxed Codex Desktop loopback failure was not forced in CI; this PR validates the diagnostic classification and formatting path locally without mutating a user machine service.

## Fork Context

This is a temporary upstream-review branch. The same accepted fix remains on `LDMB123/openclaw` fork `main`, per the fork cleanup plan.
